channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.description: ![[assets/Pasted image 20231216212554.png]] Chap01. Mysql 설치 및 접속하기 # update mysql.user set password=password(‘admin12345’) where user=‘root’ and host =‘localhost’ Chap02. Web Application 디렉토리구조 # ![[assets/Pasted image 20231216151515.png]] ![[assets/Pasted image 20231216152235.png]] ![[assets/Pasted image 20231216152939.png]] WEB (Java Project Name) webapp (Was 처리하고 Was에 구현) WEB-INF (WEB-INFORMATION) lib (라이브러리 기능) classes(Web-INF 고유 기능) web.mxl(tomcat Server와 맵핑되는 부분) <web-app version="3.1" xmlns="http://xmlns.jcp.org/xml/ns/javaee" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://xmlns.jcp.org/xml/ns/javaee http://xmlns.jcp.org/xml/ns/javaee/web-app_3_1.xsd"> </web-app> 추가하기 Chap03. Contenx등록 # Severs web.xml <Context path="/web2" docBase="C:\eGovFrame-3.10.0\workspace.edu\web2\webapp"></Context> Client 요청 -> Servers -> server.
